ermangizer-modbus.label: ERMANGIZER Modbus Decoder
ermangizer-modbus.name: Name
ermangizer-modbus.info:
Supported Input Formats:
• Buffer: Raw Buffer objects
• Hex String: Hexadecimal strings (e.g., "3f0300010016911a")
• Number Array: Arrays of numbers

Output Formats:
• Detailed: Complete decoding with metadata
• Simplified: Only register values
ermangizer-modbus.tip: Decodes ERMANGIZER frequency converter Modbus RTU messages
